text_excerpt: News | Sir Edward Leigh MP Skip to main content Sir Edward Leigh MP Member of Parliament for the Gainsborough constituency Main navigation Home News About Sir Edward Leigh About the Constituency Campaign Responses In Parliament Contact News A very successful first board meeting of Pride in Place! Friday, 24 April, 2026 Thrilled to attend a very successful and long anticipated first board meeting of Pride in Place for West Lindsey. Building on the levelling up money I got from Michael Gove. We're aiming to continue the good work made to the centre of town, like the new improvements to the market square, which look great. I hope a lot of good regeneration is going to happen and I'm feeling very confident about...
